title: Solving the SQL Gap-and-Island Problem: A Step-by-Step Guide
excerpt: Learn how to solve the classic SQL gap-and-island problem to identify consecutive active user sessions using window functions in PostgreSQL.

title: Solving the Consecutive Login Problem with PostgreSQL Window Functions
excerpt: Learn how to solve the classic SQL gap-and-island problem to identify consecutive user login streaks using window functions.

title: Parsing Clinical Notes: Extracting ICD-10 Codes and NPIs Using Python Regex
excerpt: Learn how to write and optimize regular expressions in Python to clean and extract structured medical codes and NPIs from unstructured clinical text.

title: Building Resilient Web Scrapers: Mastering Playwright Locators
excerpt: Learn how to write resilient web scrapers in Python using Playwright's user-facing locators, filtering, and structural chaining to prevent script breakage.

title: Building a Secure PostgreSQL Query Agent with LangChain
excerpt: Learn how to build a secure, read-only SQL agent using LangChain and Python to translate natural language questions into executable PostgreSQL queries.

title: Building a Secure PostgreSQL Natural Language Interface with LangChain
excerpt: Learn how to build a reliable, secure natural language interface for your PostgreSQL database using LangChain, complete with query validation guardrails.

title: Connecting Retool to PostgreSQL with Parameterized Queries
excerpt: How to build safe, performant internal tools in Retool by using parameterized SQL queries that prevent injection and optimize execution plans.

title: Bulletproof Data Pipelines: Validating ETL Output with Pydantic
excerpt: Use Pydantic models to validate data at every stage of your Python ETL pipeline, catching schema violations before they corrupt your database.

title: Recursive CTEs in PostgreSQL: Querying Hierarchical Data
excerpt: Learn how to use recursive common table expressions to traverse tree structures like org charts, category trees, and referral chains in PostgreSQL.

title: Building Fault-Tolerant n8n Workflows: Error Handling Patterns
excerpt: Three patterns for making n8n automation workflows resilient: retry logic, dead-letter queues, and graceful degradation with fallback paths.

title: Implementing Proxy Rotation in Selenium for Large-Scale Scraping
excerpt: A practical guide to rotating proxies in Python Selenium to avoid IP bans and rate limits when scraping data at scale.

title: How I Decompose Ambiguous Data Problems
excerpt: A systematic approach to tackling data analysis challenges that have no clear documentation, unclear requirements, or messy undocumented systems.
